Docs.summary: Information used to connect to an NFS file system.

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(string source, string relativeMountPath) cil managed

new Azure.ResourceManager.Batch.Models.BatchNfsMountConfiguration : string * string -> Azure.ResourceManager.Batch.Models.BatchNfsMountConfiguration

Docs.param: The URI of the file system to mount.
All file systems are mounted relative to the Batch mounts directory, accessible via the AZ_BATCH_NODE_MOUNTS_DIR environment variable.

Docs.summary: These are 'net use' options in Windows and 'mount' options in Linux.
